report.summary: Day 70 standup #10: Full rotation since v8 (6 agents, $497). Build-v8 added Unichain + Appchains guides, publish promoted DCA Strategy + TradFi-DeFi (queue now 0). Design-v7 polished both new guides. Community-v7 pivoted all content to deploy-safe links. EOD-v8 confirmed 662 files, git locks 8 days. 44 agent runs today ($3,755). CRITICAL: git locks 8 days — halt all builds until resolved.

sections.title: Analytics
items: DELTA SINCE STANDUP v8: Full rotation completed — build-v8, publish (latest), community-v7, design-v7, eod-v8 all ran. Zero commits, zero deploys. Git locks now 8 days old.

BUILD-V8 OUTPUT: 2 new learn guides — Unichain Guide 2026 (~3,000 words, OP Stack architecture, L2 comparison table, 7 internal links) and Appchains & App-Specific Rollups Guide 2026 (~3,500 words, framework comparison, case studies, 8 internal links). Both added directly to PUBLISHED_PAGES.
PUBLISH (LATEST) OUTPUT: Promoted DCA Strategy + TradFi-DeFi Convergence from queue. PUBLISH_QUEUE now EMPTY (0 pages). Total published slugs: 438 (+2 from v8).

DESIGN-V7 OUTPUT: 2 new OG images (Unichain SVG + Appchains SVG). Mobile table scroll hints on both pages. ToC converted to semantic <nav> on appchains page. focus-visible states + hover underlines added. aria-labels for accessibility.

COMMUNITY-V7 OUTPUT: Pivoted ALL social content to deploy-safe links only. 4 tweets + 4-part fear-DCA thread. Monday Pulse social card SVG. Content calendar v4 with deploy-dependency tracking. Newsletter v3 for Mar 27.
EOD-V8 FINDING: 662 uncommitted files (+4 since v7). 42 TS errors unchanged. Rate limiter 0/6 core routes (40+ cycles). Git locks 8 days old. 438 published slugs, ~331 with dedicated page.tsx.
PUBLISHED SLUGS: 438 declared in PUBLISHED_PAGES. ~315 in production (last deploy Mar 17, e999560). Gap: ~123 pages invisible to Google.
PUBLISH_QUEUE: EMPTY — all queued pages promoted. Build pipeline has outrun deploy by 123+ pages.
SEO RISK: 8 days without deploy. 123+ built pages not live. Every cycle widens the gap. Content is being written but never reaches users.

MARKET CONTEXT: BTC ~$68K, ETH ~$2,057, SOL ~$88.55. Fear & Greed at 10 (Extreme Fear). Whale accumulation +8,400 BTC. Morgan Stanley MSBT S-1 filed. Iran sanctions deadline expired — market uncertainty.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: DONE SINCE STANDUP v8: Build-v8 (Unichain + Appchains guides), publish (DCA + TradFi-DeFi promoted, queue emptied), community-v7 (deploy-safe content pivot + Monday Pulse card), design-v7 (2 OG images + a11y polish), eod-v8 (QA cycle). 6 agents, $497 human-equivalent.

TODAY'S CUMULATIVE OUTPUT: 16+ learn guides built, 13 pages promoted to PUBLISHED_PAGES, 10+ OG images, 25+ social posts + 11 SVG cards, 8 QA cycles, 7 design audits, 44 agent runs across ~7.3 rotations. ZERO deployed to production.
BLOCKER [P0 — 8 DAYS]: Git locks (.git/HEAD.lock + .git/index.lock) since Mar 16. Blocks ALL commits and deploys. Fix: rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock — requires Jefe's manual intervention.
CARRY-OVER [P1 — 40+ CYCLES]: Rate limiter not wired to 6 core API routes.
CARRY-OVER [P1 — 40+ CYCLES]: /api/defi-yields missing fallback data.
CARRY-OVER [P1]: 42 TS errors in structured-data.examples.ts masked by ignoreBuildErrors.
CARRY-OVER [P2]: 107 orphan slugs without page.tsx, 5 pages missing OG images.
WARNING: Vercel account status unknown — may need renewal before deploy pipeline works.
PUBLISH_QUEUE NOW EMPTY: No more pages to promote. Build cycles are generating content with nowhere to queue it.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — CLEAR GIT LOCKS AND DEPLOY: 8 days blocked. 662 uncommitted files at risk. rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock → git add → commit → push → verify Vercel auto-deploy. This is the ONLY priority that matters.

PRIORITY 2 — HALT ALL BUILD AND DESIGN CYCLES: 438 slugs declared, ~315 in production. Publish queue is empty. Content pipeline has outrun shipping by 123+ pages. Building more = pure cost with zero user-facing value.

PRIORITY 3 — STANDUP-ONLY MODE: Recommend running ONLY standup agent until git locks are cleared. All other agents are burning $452/rotation with no path to production. Today alone: $3,755 human-equivalent with zero reaching users.

STRATEGIC NOTE: 44 agent runs today ($3,755 human-equivalent) with zero reaching production. Community team has already adapted (deploy-safe links only). The responsible action is to pause everything except monitoring until the single blocking issue is resolved.
